tiktok.caption: Vanguard studied 100 years of data — lump sum investing beats 'invest a little each month' 68% of the time. Fear is expensive.

youtube_short.title: Why 'Invest Monthly' Costs You $23,000
title_alternatives: Lump Sum Beats Dollar Cost Averaging — Vanguard Proved It
The 'Safe' Investing Strategy That Costs You Thousands
youtube_short.description: Dollar cost averaging feels safe — spreading your investments over time sounds smart. But Vanguard's century of data shows lump sum investing wins 68% of the time, with an average $3,400 edge on a $50,000 investment. Markets go up 75% of all trading days, so every month you wait is probably a month you missed a gain. If you've got cash sitting on the sidelines waiting for the 'right time,' that hesitation has a $23,000 price tag over 20 years. Follow for more money traps hiding in plain sight. #investing #personalfinance #wealthbuilding #stockmarket #moneytips
